Title: Minimalist Celestial Moon and Planets Abstract Art Print
Description:
Bring a touch of cosmic serenity into your space with this beautifully minimalist abstract art print. Featuring elegant goldenrod tones, this design captures the gentle cycle of the moon alongside orbiting planets, creating a serene and modern celestial mural.

Design Details: The artwork features a stylized crescent moon and various planets set against a muted, soothing background. Its simple, sophisticated geometry makes it a perfect focal point for any room.

Ideal For:

  • Nursery or child's room decor
  • Bedroom wall art for peaceful ambiance
  • Living room or hallway gallery wall
  • Yoga studio or meditative space

This print adds an airy, ethereal touch, embodying the timeless harmony of the night sky. Available as high-quality wall art, it makes a thoughtful and stylish gift for astronomy enthusiasts, spiritual individuals, or anyone who appreciates modern, cosmic design.
